content.problem_latex:
Kathy started doing her homework at $$09:15$$. She used $$2\text{h }45\min $$ to complete her homework. Then she took a nap for $$20$$ minutes before she had her lunch, At what time did she have her lunch ? ．
(A) 10:20
(B) 11:35
(C) 12:00
(D) 12:20

content.problem_latex:
Some children were queueing up outside the classroom. Counting from the front to the back, Chris was $13$\textsuperscript{th}~in line. Counting from the back to the front, Becky was $10$\textsuperscript{th}~in line. Chris was in front of Becky, and there were $$12$$ people standing between Chris and Becky. How many people were there in the queue?
(A) 23
(B) 25
(C) 35
(D) 37

Counting from the back to the front, Becky was 10 th ~in line. Chris was in front of Becky, and there were 12 people standing between Chris and Becky. How many people were there in the queue? (A) 23 (B) 25 (C) 35 (D) 37
